$BCWL?E*%(%i!<$,@8$8$?;~$K8F$S=P$9%a%=%C%I$G$9!#(B. $BCWL?E*%(%i!<$H$O!"(BEPP $BK\BN$N%P%0!"(B EPP plug-in $B$N%P%0!"(B EPP plug-in $BF1;N$N>WFM$J$I$,860x$H;W$o$l$k%(%i!<$G$9!#(B $BIaDL!" throw Epp.fatal("message"); $B$3$N%a%=%C%I$O!" public static Error fatal(String str){ return new Error("EPP FATAL: "+ str); }
